resources.string: Google Sign-In is not configured yet. Add SHA-1 and SHA-256 in Firebase, then download the latest google-services.json.
Unable to get the Google ID token.
Unable to sign in right now. Please try again.
Unable to create the account right now. Please try again.
Unable to send the password reset email right now.
This email is already linked to another account.
No account was found for this email.
Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
Please enter your\nemail to reset the password
Password reset email sent successfully.\nPlease check your inbox and follow the link to set a new password.
